## What should RepoSpark help with?

Describe the repo-growth problem or workflow improvement.

## Who benefits?

Tell us whether this helps open-source maintainers, students, indie hackers, library authors, or another group.

## Suggested behavior

What should the app do?

## Extra context

Screenshots, example repos, or copy suggestions are welcome.
